title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 430.140 - Member of armed services — exemption
text:
430.140.  Member of armed services — exemption. — No provision in sections 430.080 to 430.140 shall apply to any member of the armed services of the United States of America until six months after his discharge from said service.
(L. 1945 p. 1141 § 7)
